campbell.title: Campbell City Council — September 2, 2025
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review the city's finances for July 2025, including how the city's investments performed and overall spending. They also discussed plans to improve transportation options around Campbell, including better ways for people to get around using different methods like buses, biking, and walking.
keyTopics: July 2025 investment performance and city finances
July 2025 treasurer's spending report
New multimodal transportation plan to improve buses, biking, and pedestrian access

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — March 18, 2026
saratoga.summary: The city council held a public hearing on March 18, 2026 to get community input on a proposed new rule or regulation. After hearing from residents, the council moved forward by introducing an ordinance (a new city law) and skipped the standard first reading step to speed up the process. The ordinance is scheduled to come back for final approval at the next council meeting.
keyTopics: Public hearing held to gather resident feedback
New ordinance introduced and fast-tracked for adoption
Final vote scheduled for next regular council meeting
First reading waived to expedite the process

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos City Council — April 7, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos City Council met on April 7, 2026 to approve meeting minutes from March and authorize the Town Manager to sign a construction contract with QLM, Inc. The agenda focused mainly on administrative housekeeping items from the previous month's meetings.
keyTopics: Approval of March meeting minutes from multiple sessions
Construction contract authorization with QLM, Inc.
Review of closed session and special study meetings from March

san-jose.title: San José City Council — April 8, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming agendas for April 14 and April 21, 2026. They reviewed what items to add to these meetings, decided which topics need specific time slots, and checked records from the previous week.
keyTopics: Planning the April 14 final agenda items and schedule
Planning the April 21 draft agenda items and schedule
Reviewing public records from March 26 - April 2, 2026
Setting time limits for specific agenda items as needed

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — April 7, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council held a meeting on April 7, 2026 that included both in-person and virtual attendance options. Residents could participate remotely via Zoom or phone to speak during public comment periods.
keyTopics: Virtual meeting access via Zoom and phone dial-in
Public comment procedures for remote participants
Hand-raising feature for speakers joining online

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — April 7, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held their regular meeting on April 7, 2026, starting with the Pledge of Allegiance. The council recognized two important observances: Arab-American Heritage Month and Fair Housing Month, bringing attention to these community celebrations and fair housing issues.
keyTopics: Arab-American Heritage Month recognition
Fair Housing Month observance
Regular city council meeting proceedings

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — April 8, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to discuss several community initiatives including a food and budget program, a youth-led organization called Unmuted Tabs, and job opportunities for young people in the city this summer. The council also approved minutes from their previous meeting and opened up time for residents to speak about any local concerns.
keyTopics: Budget and Bites program presentation
Unmuted Tabs youth-led organization
Summer job opportunities for Cupertino youth
Public comment period for residents

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — April 7, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara City Council held a meeting on April 7, 2026 where residents could participate either in person or online. The council is continuing to offer remote participation options so that community members who can't attend in person can still watch and comment on city business.
keyTopics: Hybrid meeting format available (in-person and Zoom)
Remote participation via Zoom video conference
Phone dial-in option for those without internet
Written public comments accepted through eComment system before meetings

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — April 7, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council met on April 7, 2026 to handle routine business and make some important decisions. The main items included reviewing the city's five-year housing and community development plan, looking at new project requests from council members, and proposing changes to how the city fills vacant council seats.
keyTopics: Updates to the 2025-2030 housing and community development plan
New project requests submitted by individual council members
Proposed changes to the council vacancy process
Approval of previous meeting minutes and upcoming meeting schedule

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — March 31, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council met to approve the city's gas utility budget and rates for the next year. The main discussion focused on financial forecasting for the gas utility, moving money between accounts, and potential changes to how much residents and businesses will pay for natural gas service.
keyTopics: Fiscal Year 2027 gas utility budget approval
Potential changes to residential and commercial gas rates
Transfer of reserves and general fund money for utilities
Review of previous Utilities Advisory Commission meeting minutes
